variables.input:
fetch dt.system.events 
| limit 1
| fields link = concat(
    "https://", 
    dt.system.environment, 
    ".apps.dynatrace.com"
)

fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`
| filter in(instance, $Instance)
| fields database
| dedup database

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
| fields 
    databaseName

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"

| expand entity = runs_on[`dt.entity.host`]
| fields entity = entityName(entity, type:"dt.entity.host")

| dedup entity

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"

| expand entity = runs_on[`dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed`]
| fields entity = entityName(entity, type:"dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed")

| dedup entity
| filter isNotNull(entity)

17.title: Connections by Instance
17.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
timeseries
  connections = avg(`sql-server.general.userConnections`),
  by: { instance}, 
  filter:  {matchesValue(instance, $Instance)}
| sort arrayAvg(connections) desc

32.title: Transactions by database

34.title: Oldest backups (Real Time)
34.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
timeseries {
    backup_age = max(`sql-server.databases.backup.age`)
    }, by: {instance, database, server, `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`, `backup_type`}, 
    filter:  {matchesValue(instance, $Instance) and matchesValue(database, $Database)}
| fields 
  instance, 
  database, 
  server, 
  `Backup Type` = backup_type,
  `Minutes since last backup`= arrayLast(backup_age)
| sort `Minutes since last backup` desc

36.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(a="Problems and Events")

37.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(id = "")

// Events
| append [
    data record(id = "")
    | append [
        fetch dt.davis.events
        | expand id = affected_entity_ids
    ]
    | append [
        fetch dt.davis.events
        | expand id = related_entity_ids
    ]
    | fieldsAdd event = true
]

// Problems
| append [
    data record(id = "")
    | append [
        fetch dt.davis.problems
        | expand id = affected_entity_ids
    ]
    | append [
        fetch dt.davis.problems
        | expand id = related_entity_ids
    ]
    | fieldsAdd problem = true 
]

| join [
    data record(id = "")
    // DB layer
    | append [fetch dt.entity.azure_sql_server]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_database`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_group`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_replica`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_host`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]

    // Infra Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.host`]
    ]

    // Cloud Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed`]
    ]
    
    // DB service layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
    ]
], on:{id}

| sort timestamp desc
| dedup display_id, event.id

| makeTimeseries 
    event = countIf(event == true ), 
    `Problem Open` = countIf(problem == true and event.status != "CLOSED"), 
    `Problem Closed` = countIf(problem == true and event.status == "CLOSED")

38.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
// Problems
fetch dt.davis.problems
    | expand id = affected_entity_ids
| append [
    fetch dt.davis.problems
    | expand id = related_entity_ids
]

| join [
    data record(id = "")
    // DB layer
    | append [fetch dt.entity.azure_sql_server]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_database`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_group`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_replica`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_host`]
    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]

    // Infra Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.host`]
    ]

    // Cloud Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed`]
    ]
    
    // DB service layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
    ]
], on:{id}, fields:{ entity.name}

| sort timestamp desc
| dedup display_id

| fields 
    `Status` = event.status,
    Problem = concat("[",display_id,"]","(",$url, "/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.problems/problem/",event.id,")"),
    timestamp, 
    `Issue` = event.name, 
    `Root Cause` = coalesce(root_cause_entity_name, ""), 
    `Description` = event.description

| sort Status asc

    | fieldsAdd event = true
]

| join [

    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_availability_group`]

    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`]

    | append [fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`]

    // Infra Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.host`]
    ]

    // Cloud Layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
        
        | fields id = runs_on[`dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed`]
    ]
    
    // DB service layer
    | append [
        fetch dt.entity.service
        | filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
        | filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"
    ]
], on:{id}

| summarize events = count(), 
    by: { event.name, Entidad = right.entity.name}

| sort events desc
| filter isNotNull(event.name)

42.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(a="SQL Server: DB layer")

43.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
fetch `dt.entity.sql:sql_server_database`
| filter matchesValue(instance, $Instance) and matchesValue(database, $Database)
| fields 
    `db state` = if(db_state == "ONLINE", "🟢", else: if( isNull(db_state), "✖", else: "🔴")), 
    Instance = entityName(child_of[`dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance`], type:"dt.entity.sql:sql_server_instance"), 
    database, 
    `recovery model` = coalesce(db_recovery_model, "No configurado"), 
    `db update ability` = coalesce(db_updateability, "No configurado"), 
    `db user access` = coalesce(db_user_access, "No configurado")

44.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(a="SQL Server: Service layer")

45.title: Avg Services DataBase Metrics (from timeframe)
45.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"

| filter matchesValue(databaseName, $DatabaseService)

| fields 
    id, 
    databaseHostNames = coalesce(databaseHostNames, "define inline code"), 
    port = coalesce(port, "NA"), 
    databaseName, 
    called_by = called_by[`dt.entity.service`]
| expand called_by
| fieldsAdd called_by = entityName(called_by, type: "dt.entity.service")
| dedup databaseHostNames, port, databaseName, called_by

| summarize Consumer = collectArray(called_by), by: { id, databaseHostNames, port, databaseName}

| join [
    timeseries 
        RequestPerMin = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true, rate:1m, rollup:sum), 
        RequestCount = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true), 
        ResponseTime = avg(dt.service.request.response_time, scalar:true), 
        RequestCountFaliure = sum(dt.service.request.count, scalar:true, filter:failed==true),
        by: { id = dt.entity.service}
    | fieldsAdd FailureRate = (RequestCountFaliure / RequestCount)*100
], on: {id}, fields: { RequestPerMin, RequestCount, ResponseTime, RequestCountFaliure, FailureRate}, kind:leftOuter

| sort RequestCount desc

| fields 
    `Service Database` = concat("[", entityName(id, type:"dt.entity.service"),"]","(",$url, "/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=",id,")"), 
    databaseHostNames, 
    port, 
    databaseName, 
    Consumer, 
    RequestPerMin, 
    RequestCount, 
    ResponseTime, 
    RequestCountFaliure, 
    FailureRate

46.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(a="SQL Server: Host layer")

47.title: Last Host Status reported
47.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
// Infra Layer
fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"

| fieldsAdd entity = runs_on[`dt.entity.host`]

| expand entity
| dedup entity
| filter isNotNull(entity)
| fieldsRemove id

| filter matchesValue(entityName(entity, type:"dt.entity.host"),$DatabaseHost)

| fieldsAdd port, ipAddress, databaseVendor

| join [
    timeseries 
        CpuUsage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), 
        MemAvail = avg(dt.host.memory.avail.percent), 
        DiskFree = avg( dt.host.disk.free), 
        by: {entity = dt.entity.host}, 
        timestamp = start()
    | fieldsAdd 
        CpuUsage = arrayLast(CpuUsage), 
        MemUsage = 100 - arrayLast(MemAvail), 
        DiskUsage = 100 - arrayLast(DiskFree), 
        LastUpdate = arrayElement(timestamp, arrayLastIndexOf(CpuUsage, arrayLast(CpuUsage)))

], on: { entity}, fields:{ CpuUsage, MemUsage, DiskUsage, LastUpdate}, kind:leftOuter

| fields 
    `Host` = concat("[", entityName(entity, type:"dt.entity.host"),"]","(",$url, "/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?detailsId=",entity,")"), 
    port, 
    ipAddress, 
    databaseVendor, 
    CpuUsage, 
    MemUsage, 
    DiskUsage, 
    LastUpdate

48.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
data record(a="SQL Server: Cloud layer")

49.title: Last Cloud Status reported
49.query:
/*
Codigo escrito y distribuido por jose.romero@dynatrace.com
github: https://github.com/Edunzz
*/
// Cloud Layer
fetch dt.entity.service
| filter serviceType == "DATABASE_SERVICE"
| filter databaseVendor == "SQL Server"

| fieldsAdd entity = runs_on[`dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed`]

| expand entity
| dedup entity
| filter isNotNull(entity)
| fieldsRemove id

| filter matchesValue(entityName(entity, type:"dt.entity.cloud:azure:sql:managed"),$DatabaseCloud)

| fieldsAdd port, ipAddress, databaseVendor

| join [
    timeseries 
        CpuUsage = avg(`cloud.azure.microsoft_sql.managedinstances.avg_cpu_percent`), 
        reserved_storage = avg( cloud.azure.microsoft_sql.managedinstances.reserved_storage_mb), 
        storage_space_used = avg( cloud.azure.microsoft_sql.managedinstances.storage_space_used_mb), 
        by: { entity = dt.entity.custom_device}, 
        timestamp = start()

    | fieldsAdd LastUpdate = arrayElement(timestamp, arrayLastIndexOf(CpuUsage, arrayLast(CpuUsage)))
    | fieldsAdd 
        CpuUsage = arrayLast(CpuUsage), 
        reserved_storage = arrayLast(reserved_storage), 
        storage_space_used = arrayLast(storage_space_used)
    | fieldsAdd storage_usage = (storage_space_used/reserved_storage)*100
    
], on: { entity}, fields:{ CpuUsage, reserved_storage, storage_space_used, storage_usage, LastUpdate}, kind:leftOuter

| fields 
    `Azure SQL` = concat("[", entity.name,"]","(",$url, "/ui/apps/dynatrace.clouds/overview/service/all/",entity,")"), 
    port = coalesce(port, "NA"), 
    ipAddress = coalesce(ipAddress, "NA"), 
    CpuUsage, 
    reserved_storage, 
    storage_space_used, 
    storage_usage, 
    LastUpdate
